title: Another layer of Sub Folder
excerpt: My organization could really benefit from one additional layer of Sub Folders. We are organizing workspaces by department, where the primary folder is “Team Personal Folders”, with a subfolder of each team member’s name.…

posts.author: STNSteph (Steph Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml: My organization could really benefit from one additional layer of Sub Folders. We are organizing workspaces by department, where the primary folder is “Team Personal Folders”, with a subfolder of each team member’s name. Due to this structure, we only have one layer of subfolder to organize all of our personal work. While I realize we could structure the workspaces differently, it’s not something the great organization wants to do because they want to keep the workspaces limited to department. Would it be possible to add one additional layer of subfolder?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @STNSteph I think that sounds like a good idea. Would you consider it fitting with this Feature Request? Subfolders Within Subfolders

Could perhaps Up Vote this request or add your thoughts to support it?

posts.author: STNSteph (Steph Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Clare! Thanks for tagging that. I added an up vote a comment to the thread you suggested.
